title: The Seal Tests
subtitle: Episode 9 of 12 · Season 4: The Fates Unravel
fate_triggered: The cosmic-age Seal-test reveals a 0.4 mm hairline crack.
synopsis: It is the cosmic-age Seal-test. Once per age, the Twelve Architects test the Seal to ensure it still closes. They have done this 4,800,000,000 times — the same count as Root-Spirit 4.8B's heartbeats — once per cosmic heartbeat. The test has always passed. Today, it does not. The Seal closes — yes — but a 0.4 millimeter hairline crack appears at the seam. Chief Scribe Un, kneeling at the Wall, is the one to record it. He freezes. He looks to K-II for guidance. K-II nods once and tells him: 'Record exactly what you see.' Un records: '0.4 mm. East-southeast seam. First crack in cosmic-test history.' The Architects vote, in silent unanimity, to convene an emergency session — the first emergency session in 1.2 cosmic ages. K-V, who normally remains seated, RISES — only the third time K-V has ever stood (the first two are unrecorded). K-V signals K-II to call in Vigolas. Vigolas arrives within a Helios storm-flicker. K-V says one sentence to him. The sentence is not recorded — Un is told to leave the Wall. Vigolas's face goes still. He bows. He says: 'I will start with Old Halla.' He leaves. Un returns to the Wall, but K-V has not allowed him to record what was said. The crack remains.

key_scenes.action: The cosmic-age Seal-test. Chief Scribe Un kneeling at the Wall.
A 0.4 mm hairline crack at the east-southeast seam. Un freezes.
K-II nods once. 'Record exactly what you see.'
First emergency session in 1.2 cosmic ages. K-V rises (third time only in history).
Vigolas arrives within a Helios storm-flicker. K-V whispers one sentence.
K-V signals Un to leave. Un leaves. The sentence is not recorded.
Vigolas bows. Says: 'I will start with Old Halla.' Leaves.

cliffhanger: Head Librarian Cork — who has not moved in three cosmic ages — turns his head slightly to watch Vigolas leave. Slightly. But noticeably. The Library notices a Librarian moving, and a single book on the K-XII shelf re-shelves itself.

panel_storyboard.composition: Wide of the Ring of Seats. Twelve seats. The Seal at center. Twelve robed figures, the seats glowing softly.
Close-up of the Seal at the moment of test. Chief Scribe Un kneeling at the Wall, ink ready.
The crack appearing. A single hairline split at the seam, gold light leaking through.
panel_storyboard.emotion: first such moment in cosmic history

panel_storyboard.composition: Un's brush hovering over parchment. Hand visibly trembling. Looking up to K-II for permission.
K-II standing at his seat, nodding once, mouth barely moving.
Wide of the Architects all rising at K-V's signal. K-V — partially silhouetted, not fully shown — visibly standing.
panel_storyboard.caption: Only the third time K-V had ever stood.

panel_storyboard.composition: Vigolas striding into the Ring through the open Seal-aperture. Storm-cloak still crackling from his transit.
K-V leaning in to whisper to Vigolas. Both partially obscured. Un visibly turning to leave.
panel_storyboard.caption: The sentence was not recorded.

panel_storyboard.composition: Vigolas's face after the whisper. Stoic. Bowing.
panel_storyboard.dialogue: Vigolas: 'I will start with Old Halla.'

panel_storyboard.composition: Vigolas departing through the Seal. Head Librarian Cork visible in the background, head turned slightly, hollow eye-sockets following Vigolas.
The K-XII shelf. A single book sliding back into place by itself.
panel_storyboard.caption: The Library remembered.

cosmic_price_paid: The Seal now bears a 0.4 mm hairline crack at the east-southeast seam. The Library has noticed a Librarian move. K-V has stood (3rd time in history). Vigolas now bears K-V's secret instruction.
callout_for_cosmos_drawer: In Season 4, the cosmic-age Seal-test produced a 0.4 mm hairline crack — the first failure in 4.8 billion tests. K-V rose. K-V whispered one sentence to Vigolas, unrecorded.
